authors: Jaewon Royce Choi Su Jung Kim Yayu Zhou Edward C. Malthouse a Manship
raw_title: The Role of Syndicated Content in Retaining Digital Newspaper Subscribers: Evidence from Clickstream and Subscription Data
title_en: The Role of Syndicated Content in Retaining Digital Newspaper Subscribers: Evidence from Clickstream and Subscription Data
title_zh: 联合内容在保留数字报纸订阅者中的作用：来自点击流和订阅数据的证据
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了数字报纸如何使用联合内容（即从其他来源获取的内容）来保持订阅者。通过分析用户的点击行为和订阅数据，研究发现联合内容可能影响用户是否继续订阅。这对于理解数字新闻商业模式和用户参与度很重要。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how digital newspapers use syndicated content (content obtained from other sources) to retain subscribers. By analyzing user click behavior and subscription data, the research finds that syndicated content may influence whether users continue their subscriptions. This is important for understanding digital news business models and user engagement.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字新闻订阅模式中内容策略对用户保留的影响，结合商业和计算机科学视角，探索数据驱动的方法来优化订阅服务。
research_direction_en: Investigating the impact of content strategies on user retention in digital news subscription models, integrating business and computer science perspectives to explore data-driven approaches for optimizing subscription services.
